response.overview: Alessandra is a young woman whose days are filled with busyness. She lives with her parents and younger brother. From morning until late afternoon, she is occupied with her job. In the evenings, she is busy with OMK (Catholic youth) activities and her church community, including on Saturdays and Sundays.  What she does is certainly not negative. In fact, she greatly admires Pope Francis, which is evident from the small actions she takes in her daily life. However, all these positive activities have actually caused her to become distant from her family.  Until one day, a minor accident made her realize that serving for the glory of God does not mean she has to neglect her family.
response.title: Alessandra
